mapper.insert: insert into LSMD_T ( LSMD_T_ID, LSMD001, LSMD002, LSMD003, LSMD004, LSMD005, LSMD006, LSMD007, LSMD008, LSMD010, LSMD013, LSMD014, LSMD015, LSMD019, LSMD024, LSMD025, LSMD026, LSMD027, LSMD028, LSMD029, LSMD030, LSMD031, LSMD033, LSMD034, LSMD036, LSMD037, LSMD038, LSMD039, LSMD042, LSMD045, LSMD046, LSMD047, LSMD053, LSMD054, LSMD055, LSMD058, LSMD081,LSMD082, LSMD083, LSMD084, LSMD085, LSMD086, LSMD906, LSMD907, LSMDCRTDT, LSMDCRTID, LSMDENT, LSMDMODDT, LSMDMODID, LSMDOWNDP, LSMDOWNID, LSMDSITE, LSMDSTUS ) values ( #{lsmdTId}, #{lsmd001}, #{lsmd002}, #{lsmd003}, #{lsmd004}, #{lsmd005}, #{lsmd006}, #{lsmd007}, #{lsmd008}, #{lsmd010}, #{lsmd013}, #{lsmd014}, #{lsmd015}, #{lsmd019}, #{lsmd024}, #{lsmd025}, #{lsmd026}, #{lsmd027}, #{lsmd028}, #{lsmd029}, #{lsmd030}, #{lsmd031}, #{lsmd033}, #{lsmd034},#{lsmd036}, #{lsmd037},#{lsmd038}, #{lsmd039}, #{lsmd042}, #{lsmd045}, #{lsmd046}, #{lsmd047}, #{lsmd053}, #{lsmd054}, #{lsmd055}, #{lsmd058}, #{lsmd081},#{lsmd082}, #{lsmd083}, #{lsmd084}, #{lsmd085}, #{lsmd086}, #{lsmd906}, #{lsmd907}, #{lsmdcrtdt}, #{lsmdcrtid}, #{lsmdent}, #{lsmdmoddt}, #{lsmdmodid}, #{lsmdowndp}, #{lsmdownid}, #{lsmdsite}, #{lsmdstus} )
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT TOP 10 A.DOC_NO AS docNo,A.DOC_DATE AS DOC_DATE, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10))AS docDate, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE ,N' ')AS departmentNo, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME ,N' ')AS departmentName, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_CODE ,N' ')AS employeeNo, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_NAME ,N' ')AS employeeName, C.CUSTOMER_CODE AS customerNo, C.CUSTOMER_NAME AS customerName, '' AS supplierNo, '' AS supplierName FROM SALES_DELIVERY AS A INNER JOIN SALES_DELIVERY_D AS B ON A.SALES_DELIVERY_ID=B.SALES_DELIVERY_ID INNER JOIN PLANT ON A.PLANT_ID=PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN CUSTOMER AS C ON A.CUSTOMER_ID=C.CUSTOMER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AS D ON A.Owner_Emp=D.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS E ON A.Owner_Dept=E.ADMIN_UNIT_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON B.ITEM_ID=ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE='1' AND A.ApproveStatus=N'N' AND A.CATEGORY=N'25'
AND A.DOC_NO like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
AND CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) <= #{startDate}
AND CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) >= #{endDate}
AND (CUSTOMER_NAME like concat('%',#{customer},'%') or CUSTOMER_CODE like concat('%',#{customer},'%'))
AND (EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE like concat('%',#{employee},'%') or EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME like concat('%',#{employee},'%'))
AND (E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME like concat('%',#{department},'%') or E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE like concat('%',#{department},'%'))
AND ITEM.ITEM_CODE like concat('%', LEFT(#{barCode}, CHARINDEX('#', #{barCode}) - 1), '%')
ORDER BY A.DOC_DATE DESC,A.DOC_NO ASC

SELECT [SALES_DELIVERY].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo], CAST([SALES_DELIVERY].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS [docDate], [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_CODE] AS [customerNo], [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_NAME] AS [customerName], [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemCode], ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] ,N' ') AS [productCode], '' AS stockCode, [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec], [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[applyQty] AS [applyQty], SUM(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY],0)) AS [stockQty], SUM(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].TOTAL_SECOND_QTY, 0)) AS referenceStockQty, ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE,'') AS referenceStockUnitNo, ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME,'') AS referenceStockUnitName, 0 AS [scanSumQty], '' AS supplierNo, '' AS supplierName, ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE] ,N' ') AS warehouseCode, ISNULL([BIN].[BIN_CODE] ,N' ') AS binCode, ISNULL([ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE] ,N' ') AS lotNo, UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName, ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE,'') AS referenceUnitNo, ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME,'') AS referenceUnitName, dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,[SALES_DELIVERY_D].[applyQty],ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID,0) AS referenceQty, UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo, UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName, dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,[SALES_DELIVERY_D].[applyQty], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID,0) AS valuationQty, UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo, UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName, UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep, --,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,[SALES_DELIVERY_D].[applyQty], ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID,0) AS stockUnitQty, SUM([SALES_DELIVERY_D].sourceDocQty ) AS sourceDocQty, CASE WHEN dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) ='0' THEN 1 ELSE dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) END as rate, ISNULL(UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT,0) as [keep] FROM [SALES_DELIVERY] AS [SALES_DELIVERY] INNER JOIN [CUSTOMER] ON [SALES_DELIVERY].[CUSTOMER_ID] = [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_BUSINESS_ID] INNER JOIN ( SELECT [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[SALES_DELIVERY_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID, SUM([SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_QTY] -[SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ISSUED_QTY]) AS [applyQty], SUM([SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_QTY] ) AS sourceDocQty FROM [SALES_DELIVERY_D] GROUP BY [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[SALES_DELIVERY_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID ) AS [SALES_DELIVERY_D] ON [SALES_DELIVERY].[SALES_DELIVERY_ID] = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[SALES_DELIVERY_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID], SUM(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY],0)) as [TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY], SUM(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[TOTAL_SECOND_QTY],0)) as [TOTAL_SECOND_QTY] FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN SALES_DELIVERY_D.SOURCE_ID_RTK ='BORROW_DOC.BORROW_DOC_D' THEN BORROW_DOC.BO_ID_RTK ELSE 'OTHER' END AS BO_ID_RTK, CASE WHEN SALES_DELIVERY_D.SOURCE_ID_RTK ='BORROW_DOC.BORROW_DOC_D' THEN BORROW_DOC.BO_ID_ROid ELSE '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' END AS BO_ID_ROid, [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] FROM SALES_DELIVERY_D INNER JOIN SALES_DELIVERY on SALES_DELIVERY.SALES_DELIVERY_ID = SALES_DELIVERY_D.SALES_DELIVERY_ID LEFT JOIN BORROW_DOC_D ON SALES_DELIVERY_D.SOURCE_ID_ROid = BORROW_DOC_D.BORROW_DOC_D_ID AND SALES_DELIVERY_D.SOURCE_ID_RTK ='BORROW_DOC.BORROW_DOC_D' LEFT JOIN BORROW_DOC ON BORROW_DOC.BORROW_DOC_ID = BORROW_DOC_D.BORROW_DOC_ID WHERE
[SALES_DELIVERY].[DOC_NO] like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
AND [SALES_DELIVERY].[ApproveStatus] = N'N' AND [SALES_DELIVERY].[CATEGORY] = N'25' ) AS [SALES_DELIVERY_D] INNER JOIN ( SELECT [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID], [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID], [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID, [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID, [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid, SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[INVENTORY_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY], SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[SECOND_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_SECOND_QTY] FROM [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[Owner_Org_ROid] =[PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE]='1' GROUP BY [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID], [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID], [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID, [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID, [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid ) AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID]=[SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID] AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BO_ID_RTK =[SALES_DELIVERY_D].BO_ID_RTK AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BO_ID_ROid =[SALES_DELIVERY_D].BO_ID_ROid AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] OR [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' ) AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID] OR [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID]= '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' ) AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID =[SALES_DELIVERY_D].ITEM_LOT_ID or [SALES_DELIVERY_D].ITEM_LOT_ID= '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') GROUP BY [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] ) AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID]=[SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID] AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] ) AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID] ) AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID =[SALES_DELIVERY_D].ITEM_LOT_ID ) LEFT OUTER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID]=[WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [BIN] ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID] = [BIN].[BIN_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_LOT] ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] = [ITEM_LOT].[ITEM_LOT_ID]
LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID=UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] WHERE
[SALES_DELIVERY].[DOC_NO] like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
AND [SALES_DELIVERY].[ApproveStatus] = N'N' AND [SALES_DELIVERY].[CATEGORY] = N'25' GROUP BY [SALES_DELIVERY].[DOC_NO], [SALES_DELIVERY].[DOC_DATE], [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_CODE], [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_NAME], [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE], [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION], [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[applyQty], [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], [BIN].[BIN_CODE], [ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE], UNIT.UNIT_NAME, UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE, UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME, UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE, UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME, UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT, ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, [SALES_DELIVERY_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, [SALES_DELIVERY_D].sourceDocQty, UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT

SELECT DISTINCT TOP 10 A.DOC_NO AS docNo, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS docDate, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS createDate, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS departmentNo, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') AS departmentName, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_CODE, N' ') AS employeeNo, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_NAME, N' ') AS employeeName, C.CUSTOMER_CODE AS customerNo, C.CUSTOMER_NAME AS customerName, '' AS supplierNo, '' AS supplierName FROM SALES_DELIVERY AS A INNER JOIN SALES_DELIVERY_D AS B ON A.SALES_DELIVERY_ID = B.SALES_DELIVERY_ID INNER JOIN PLANT ON A.PLANT_ID = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = B.ITEM_ID INNER JOIN CUSTOMER AS C ON A.CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AS D ON A.Owner_Emp = D.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS E ON A.Owner_Dept = E.ADMIN_UNIT_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' AND A.ApproveStatus = N'Y' -- AND A.CATEGORY = N'24' -- AND B.ISSUED = N'0' AND B.INSPECTION_STATUS <> '2'
and A.DOC_NO like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
and (C.CUSTOMER_CODE like concat('%',#{customer},'%') or C.CUSTOMER_NAME like concat('%',#{customer},'%'))
and (E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE like concat('%',#{department},'%') OR E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME like concat('%',#{department},'%'))
and (D.EMPLOYEE_CODE like concat('%',#{employee},'%') OR D.EMPLOYEE_NAME like concat('%',#{employee},'%'))
and A.DOC_DATE >=#{startDate}
and A.DOC_DATE <=#{endDate}
and ITEM.ITEM_CODE like concat('%',#{itemCode},'%')
and ITEM.ITEM_NAME like concat('%',#{itemName},'%')
and ITEM.ITEM_CODE like concat('%', LEFT(#{barCode}, CHARINDEX('#', #{barCode}) - 1), '%')
ORDER BY docDate DESC, docNo ASC

SELECT [SALES_DELIVERY].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] , CAST([SALES_DELIVERY].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS [docDate] , [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_CODE] AS [customerNo] , [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_NAME] AS [customerName] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemCode] , ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE], N' ') AS [productCode] , '' AS stockCode , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] , CAST([SALES_DELIVERY_D].[applyQty] as real) AS [applyQty] , CAST(SUM(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY], 0)) as real) AS [stockQty] , sum(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].TOTAL_SECOND_QTY, 0)) AS referenceStockQty , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceStockUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceStockUnitName , 0 AS [scanSumQty] , '' AS supplierNo , '' AS supplierName , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') AS warehouseCode , ISNULL([BIN].[BIN_CODE], N' ') AS binCode , ISNULL([ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE], N' ') AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[applyQty], ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[applyQty], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID, 0) AS valuationQty , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep , SUM([SALES_DELIVERY_D].sourceDocQty) AS sourceDocQty , CASE WHEN dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) = '0' THEN 1 ELSE dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) END as rate , ISNULL(UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT, 0) as [keep] FROM [SALES_DELIVERY] AS [SALES_DELIVERY] INNER JOIN [CUSTOMER] ON [SALES_DELIVERY].[CUSTOMER_ID] = [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_BUSINESS_ID] INNER JOIN (SELECT [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[SALES_DELIVERY_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID , SALES_DELIVERY_D.SOURCE_ID_RTK , SALES_DELIVERY_D.SOURCE_ID_ROid , SUM( CASE WHEN [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_QTY] < [SALES_DELIVERY_D].ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY + [SALES_DELIVERY_D].SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY THEN [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_QTY] ELSE [SALES_DELIVERY_D].ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY + [SALES_DELIVERY_D].SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY END - [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ISSUED_QTY] ) AS [applyQty] , SUM([SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS sourceDocQty FROM [SALES_DELIVERY_D] WHERE -- [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ISSUED] = N'0'AND [SALES_DELIVERY_D].INSPECTION_STATUS <> '2' GROUP BY [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[SALES_DELIVERY_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID, SALES_DELIVERY_D.SOURCE_ID_RTK, SALES_DELIVERY_D.SOURCE_ID_ROid) AS [SALES_DELIVERY_D] ON [SALES_DELIVERY].[SALES_DELIVERY_ID] = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[SALES_DELIVERY_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] , sum(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY], 0)) as [TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY] , sum(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[TOTAL_SECOND_QTY], 0)) as [TOTAL_SECOND_QTY] FROM (SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN SALES_DELIVERY_D.SOURCE_ID_RTK = 'BORROW_DOC.BORROW_DOC_D' THEN BORROW_DOC.BO_ID_RTK ELSE 'OTHER' END AS BO_ID_RTK , CASE WHEN SALES_DELIVERY_D.SOURCE_ID_RTK = 'BORROW_DOC.BORROW_DOC_D' THEN BORROW_DOC.BO_ID_ROid ELSE '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' END AS BO_ID_ROid , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] FROM SALES_DELIVERY_D inner join SALES_DELIVERY on SALES_DELIVERY.SALES_DELIVERY_ID = SALES_DELIVERY_D.SALES_DELIVERY_ID left join BORROW_DOC_D ON SALES_DELIVERY_D.SOURCE_ID_ROid = BORROW_DOC_D.BORROW_DOC_D_ID AND SALES_DELIVERY_D.SOURCE_ID_RTK = 'BORROW_DOC.BORROW_DOC_D' LEFT JOIN BORROW_DOC ON BORROW_DOC.BORROW_DOC_ID = BORROW_DOC_D.BORROW_DOC_ID WHERE [SALES_DELIVERY].[DOC_NO] = #{docNo} AND [SALES_DELIVERY].[ApproveStatus] = N'Y' -- AND [SALES_DELIVERY].[CATEGORY] = N'24' ) AS [SALES_DELIVERY_D]
INNER JOIN
(SELECT [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid , SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[INVENTORY_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY] , SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[SECOND_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_SECOND_QTY] FROM [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[Owner_Org_ROid] = [PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE] = '1' GROUP BY [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid) AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID] AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BO_ID_RTK = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].BO_ID_RTK AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BO_ID_ROid = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].BO_ID_ROid AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] OR [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID] OR [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID] = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].ITEM_LOT_ID or [SALES_DELIVERY_D].ITEM_LOT_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') group by [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID]) AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_ID] AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID]) AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID]) AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID = [SALES_DELIVERY_D].ITEM_LOT_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] = [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [BIN] ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[BIN_ID] = [BIN].[BIN_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_LOT] ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] = [ITEM_LOT].[ITEM_LOT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 ON [SALES_DELIVERY_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] WHERE [SALES_DELIVERY].[DOC_NO] = #{docNo} AND [SALES_DELIVERY].[ApproveStatus] = N'Y' -- AND [SALES_DELIVERY].[CATEGORY] = N'24' GROUP BY [SALES_DELIVERY].[DOC_NO], [SALES_DELIVERY].[DOC_DATE], [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_CODE], [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_NAME] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE], [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION], [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE], [SALES_DELIVERY_D].[applyQty] , [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE] , [BIN].[BIN_CODE] , [ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].PRICE_UNIT_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , [SALES_DELIVERY_D].sourceDocQty , UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT

SELECT DISTINCT TOP 10 A.DOC_NO AS docNo, A.DOC_DATE AS DOC_DATE, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS createDate, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS departmentNo, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') AS departmentName, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_CODE, N' ') AS employeeNo, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_NAME, N' ') AS employeeName, C.CUSTOMER_CODE AS customerNo, C.CUSTOMER_NAME AS customerName, '' AS supplierNo, '' AS supplierName FROM SALES_RETURN AS A INNER JOIN PLANT ON A.PLANT_ID = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN CUSTOMER AS C ON A.CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AS D ON A.Owner_Emp = D.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS E ON A.Owner_Dept = E.ADMIN_UNIT_ID INNER JOIN SALES_RETURN_D AS B ON A.SALES_RETURN_ID = B.SALES_RETURN_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON B.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' AND A.ApproveStatus = N'Y' AND A.CATEGORY = N'26' AND A.RECEIPTED_STATUS IN (N'1', N'2') AND B.ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY + B.SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY + B.SCRAP_BUSINESS_QTY - B.RECEIPTED_BUSINESS_QTY > 0
and A.DOC_NO like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
and (C.CUSTOMER_CODE like concat('%',#{costumer},'%') or C.CUSTOMER_NAME like concat('%',#{costumer},'%'))
and (D.EMPLOYEE_CODE like concat('%',#{employee},'%') or D.EMPLOYEE_NAME like concat('%',#{employee},'%'))
and (E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE like concat('%',#{department},'%') or E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME like concat('%',#{department},'%'))
and A.DOC_DATE > #{endDate}
and A.DOC_DATE < #{startDate}
UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT TOP 10 A.DOC_NO AS docNo, A.DOC_DATE AS DOC_DATE, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS createDate, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS departmentNo, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') AS departmentName, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_CODE, N' ') AS employeeNo, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_NAME, N' ') AS employeeName, C.CUSTOMER_CODE AS customerNo, C.CUSTOMER_NAME AS customerName, '' AS supplierNo, '' AS supplierName FROM SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT AS A INNER JOIN PLANT ON A.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN CUSTOMER AS C ON A.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AS D ON A.Owner_Emp = D.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS E ON A.Owner_Dept = E.ADMIN_UNIT_ID INNER JOIN SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D AS B ON A.SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_ID = B.SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON B.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' AND A.ApproveStatus = N'N'
and A.DOC_NO like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
and (C.CUSTOMER_CODE like concat('%',#{costumer},'%') or C.CUSTOMER_NAME like concat('%',#{costumer},'%'))
and (D.EMPLOYEE_CODE like concat('%',#{employee},'%') or D.EMPLOYEE_NAME like concat('%',#{employee},'%'))
and (E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE like concat('%',#{department},'%') or E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME like concat('%',#{department},'%'))
and A.DOC_DATE > #{endDate}
and A.DOC_DATE < #{startDate}
ORDER BY A.DOC_DATE DESC, A.DOC_NO ASC

SELECT [SALES_RETURN].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] , CAST([SALES_RETURN].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS [docDate] , [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_CODE] AS [customerNo] , [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_NAME] AS [customerName] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemCode] , ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE], N' ') AS [productCode] , '' AS stockCode , [SALES_RETURN_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] , [SALES_RETURN_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] , SUM(SALES_RETURN_D.ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY + SALES_RETURN_D.SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY + SALES_RETURN_D.SCRAP_BUSINESS_QTY - SALES_RETURN_D.RECEIPTED_BUSINESS_QTY) AS [applyQty] , 0 AS [stockQty] , 0 AS [scanSumQty] , '' AS supplierNo , '' AS supplierName , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') AS warehouseNo , ISNULL([BIN].[BIN_CODE], N' ') AS storageSpacesNo , ISNULL([ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE], N' ') AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM(SALES_RETURN_D.ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY + SALES_RETURN_D.SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY + SALES_RETURN_D.SCRAP_BUSINESS_QTY - SALES_RETURN_D.RECEIPTED_BUSINESS_QTY), ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM(SALES_RETURN_D.ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY + SALES_RETURN_D.SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY + SALES_RETURN_D.SCRAP_BUSINESS_QTY - SALES_RETURN_D.RECEIPTED_BUSINESS_QTY), SALES_RETURN_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID, 0) AS valuationQty , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep , SUM(SALES_RETURN_D.ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY + SALES_RETURN_D.SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY + SALES_RETURN_D.SCRAP_BUSINESS_QTY) AS sourceDocQty , 0 keep , 1 rate, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS departmentNo, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') AS departmentName, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_CODE, N' ') AS employeeNo, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_NAME, N' ') AS employeeName FROM [SALES_RETURN] AS [SALES_RETURN] INNER JOIN [SALES_RETURN_D] AS [SALES_RETURN_D] ON [SALES_RETURN].[SALES_RETURN_ID] = [SALES_RETURN_D].[SALES_RETURN_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] AS [ITEM] ON [SALES_RETURN_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [SALES_RETURN_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] AS [UNIT] ON [SALES_RETURN_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [CUSTOMER] AS [CUSTOMER] ON [SALES_RETURN].[CUSTOMER_ID] = [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [SALES_RETURN_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] = [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [BIN] ON [SALES_RETURN_D].[BIN_ID] = [BIN].[BIN_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_LOT] ON [SALES_RETURN_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] = [ITEM_LOT].[ITEM_LOT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 ON SALES_RETURN_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AS D ON SALES_RETURN.Owner_Emp = D.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS E ON SALES_RETURN.Owner_Dept = E.ADMIN_UNIT_ID WHERE [SALES_RETURN].[DOC_NO] = #{docNo} AND [SALES_RETURN].[ApproveStatus] = N'Y' AND [SALES_RETURN].[CATEGORY] = N'26' AND [SALES_RETURN_D].[RECEIPTED] = N'0' AND SALES_RETURN_D.ACCEPTED_BUSINESS_QTY + SALES_RETURN_D.SP_RECEIPT_BUSINESS_QTY + SALES_RETURN_D.SCRAP_BUSINESS_QTY - SALES_RETURN_D.RECEIPTED_BUSINESS_QTY > 0 GROUP BY [SALES_RETURN].[DOC_NO], [SALES_RETURN].[DOC_DATE], [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_CODE], [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_NAME] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE], [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE], [SALES_RETURN_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [SALES_RETURN_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION], [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] , [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE] , [BIN].[BIN_CODE] , [ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , SALES_RETURN_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, D.EMPLOYEE_CODE, D.EMPLOYEE_NAME UNION ALL SELECT [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT].[DOC_NO] AS [docNo] , CAST([SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS [docDate] , [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_CODE] AS [customerNo] , [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_NAME] AS [customerName] , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS [itemCode] , ISNULL([ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE], N' ') AS [productCode] , '' AS stockCode , [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [itemName] , [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS [itemSpec] , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] , SUM(SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D.BUSINESS_QTY) AS [applyQty] , 0 AS [stockQty] , 0 AS [scanSumQty] , '' AS supplierNo , '' AS supplierName , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') AS warehouseNo , ISNULL([BIN].[BIN_CODE], N' ') AS storageSpacesNo , ISNULL([ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE], N' ') AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM(SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D.BUSINESS_QTY), ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE AS valuationUnitNo , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME AS valuationUnitName , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM(SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D.BUSINESS_QTY), SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID, 0) AS valuationQty , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep , SUM(SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D.BUSINESS_QTY) AS sourceDocQty , 0 keep , 1 rate, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS departmentNo, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') AS departmentName, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_CODE, N' ') AS employeeNo, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_NAME, N' ') AS employeeName FROM [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT] AS [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT] INNER JOIN [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D] AS [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D] ON [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT].[SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_ID] = [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D].[SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_ID] INNER JOIN [ITEM] AS [ITEM] ON [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D].[ITEM_ID] = [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] INNER JOIN [UNIT] AS [UNIT] ON [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] = [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] INNER JOIN [CUSTOMER] AS [CUSTOMER] ON [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT].SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID = [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_BUSINESS_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D].[WAREHOUSE_ID] = [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [BIN] ON [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D].[BIN_ID] = [BIN].[BIN_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_LOT] ON [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] = [ITEM_LOT].[ITEM_LOT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_03 ON SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID = UNIT_03.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AS D ON SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT.Owner_Emp = D.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS E ON SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT.Owner_Dept = E.ADMIN_UNIT_ID WHERE [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT].[DOC_NO] = #{docNo} AND [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT].[ApproveStatus] = N'N' GROUP BY [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT].[DOC_NO], [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT].[DOC_DATE], [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_CODE] , [CUSTOMER].[CUSTOMER_NAME], [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE], [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_CODE] , [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION], [SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION], [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] , [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE] , [BIN].[BIN_CODE] , [ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_03.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_03.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , SALES_RETURN_RECEIPT_D.PRICE_UNIT_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, D.EMPLOYEE_CODE, D.EMPLOYEE_NAME
